etymology.description: č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass") + phonetic: äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i) = root of a plant
etymology.interpretation: The character čŤ„ combines č‰ą(č‰ą) (cÇŽo, "grass"), which often denotes things related to plants or vegetation, with äşĄ(äşĄ) (hĂ i) for its phonetic value. This combination suggests the meaning of 'roots' as it relates to the vegetation signified by the grass radical.
